results.title: next-zombie
results.description: next-zombie automatically restarts your Next.js dev server when it crashes, providing auto-recovery for Turbopack instability without manual intervention.

results.title: Next Forge
results.description: A production-grade Turborepo template for Next.js apps, designed to provide everything needed to build a SaaS application, including auth, database, payments, and more.

results.title: Next-Fast-Turbo
results.description: Next-Fast-Turbo is a starter monorepo project designed as a personal kit for Next.js and FastAPI projects, featuring a Next.js frontend, a FastAPI backend, and built with Turborepo.

results.title: Makerkit Next Supabase Turbo
results.description: Makerkit is a React SaaS boilerplate for Next.js and Supabase, enabling rapid development of SaaS applications with features like authentication, billing, and content management.

results.title: Next Forge
results.description: Next Forge is a production-grade Turborepo template for Next.js apps, offering a comprehensive and opinionated starting point for modern web applications with minimal configuration.

results.title: Next Fast Turbo
results.description: Next-Fast-Turbo is an open-source monorepo project scaffold featuring a Next.js frontend, FastAPI backend, and Mintlify documentation, designed for easy local and production setup with TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier, and Vercel deployments.

results.title: Next.js
results.description: Next.js enables you to create full-stack web applications by extending the latest React features and integrating powerful Rust-based JavaScript tooling for the fastest builds.

results.title: Next Forge
results.description: Next Forge is a production-grade Turborepo template for Next.js apps, offering a comprehensive and opinionated starting point for modern web applications with minimal configuration.

results.title: Nextjs Toploader
results.description: A Next.js Top Loading Bar component made using nprogress, works with Next.js 15 , Next.js 14 and React.

results.title: Next.js
results.description: Next.js is a React framework for building full-stack web applications. It provides additional features and optimizations, automatically configuring lower-level tools to help developers focus on building products quickly.

results.title: Fullstack Monorepo Template with Expo, Turbo, Next.js, Convex, and Clerk
results.description: A modern TypeScript monorepo template for fullstack web and native applications, featuring Turborepo, Next.js, Expo, Convex for the backend, Clerk for authentication, and optional OpenAI integration for AI features like text summarization, with end-to-end type safety and realtime capabilities.

results.title: MagicYan
results.description: An official Turborepo starter template that includes Next.js apps, a shared React component library, and ESLint/TypeScript configurations for efficient monorepo development.

results.title: Turborepo
results.description: Turborepo is a high-performance build system for JavaScript and TypeScript codebases, designed to scale monorepos and speed up workflows in single-package workspaces by optimizing task execution and utilizing remote caching.

results.title: Next.js
results.description: Next.js is a React framework for building full-stack web applications, featuring file-system routing, API routes, and optimized rendering with the App Router.

results.title: Next.js
results.description: Next.js is a React framework for building full-stack web applications, offering features like server-side rendering, static site generation, and API routes.

results.title: NextFaster
results.description: A highly performant e-commerce template using Next.js

results.title: Supastarter Next.js
results.description: Supastarter is a full-stack starter kit designed to accelerate the development of production-ready and scalable web applications, particularly SaaS products, by providing common features and best practices.

results.title: Turbo Power
results.description: TurboPower is a power-pack for Turbo Streams, adding new actions and the 'morph' action for enhanced dynamic updates in web applications.

results.title: Next.js Boilerplate
results.description: A boilerplate and starter for Next.js 15+ with App Router, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript, prioritizing developer experience with tools like ESLint, Prettier, Vitest, and Clerk authentication.

results.title: Splash Protocol SDK
results.description: An official Turborepo starter template that includes Next.js apps, a React component library, and ESLint/TypeScript configurations for efficient monorepo management.

results.title: Next.js Supabase Stripe Starter
results.description: Bootstrap your SaaS with a modern tech stack including Next.js, Supabase, Stripe, React Email, and Tailwind CSS, featuring webhooks for Stripe-Supabase synchronization and prebuilt pages.

results.title: Next.js FastAPI Template
results.description: A Next.js and FastAPI template providing a solid foundation for scalable, high-performance web applications with end-to-end type safety using TypeScript and Zod validation.

results.title: Next.js Enterprise Boilerplate
results.description: A production-ready template for building enterprise applications with Next.js, offering a streamlined foundation with high-impact features to maximize developer productivity and accelerate time-to-market.

results.title: Next.js FastAPI Template
results.description: A template for scalable, high-performance web applications, integrating FastAPI and Next.js with TypeScript and Zod for end-to-end type safety, schema validation, and quick deployment.

results.title: Next.js Starter
results.description: A Next.js 15 starter template with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/ui, Stripe, Next-auth, Drizzle ORM, and Jest for a robust and modern web application.

results.title: Next Nexus
results.description: Next-nexus is an intelligent data layer for Next.js that simplifies applications with automatic caching, seamless hydration, and built-in cost-saving logic.

results.title: Create T3 Turbo
results.description: A starter repository for migrating T3 applications into a monorepo using Turborepo, featuring Next.js, Expo, Tailwind CSS, tRPC, and better-auth.

results.title: Makerkit: Next.js and Supabase V2 SaaS Starter Kit
results.description: Makerkit is a React SaaS boilerplate for Next.js and Supabase, designed to help you launch your next SaaS application quickly.

results.title: Turborepo Docs
results.description: Turborepo is a high-performance build system for JavaScript and TypeScript codebases, designed to scale monorepos and speed up workflows in single-package workspaces. It optimizes task execution with features like remote caching and intelligent task scheduling.

results.title: Next.js Starter Template
results.description: A production-ready Next.js starter template with modern tooling, featuring Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, NextAuth.js, Drizzle ORM, Stripe integration, and comprehensive testing.
